description: In the present, Daisy identifies Krasnoyarsk Krai as a likely base for Ivanov's submarine. The team infiltrates the detention facility there, dividing into squads: Fitz and Simmons to the communications room, while the rest search for Mace and May. Coulson warns the team to expect traps, emphasizing the mission to recover their people.
location: Krasnoyarsk Krai detention facility / former Soviet submarine bay
